title: Bridge Essay: Mystical experiences during magnesium-Ibogaine are associated with improvements

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Liberation/Enlightenment** (Phase 15) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Liberation/Enlightenment to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Mystical experiences during magnesium-Ibogaine are associated with improvements in PTSD symptoms in veterans.** — J Affect Disord. PMID: 41265656. DOI: 10.1016/j.jad.2025.120722. Ibogaine is an atypical psychedelic that evokes unique subjective effects, including mystical experiences. Mystical experiences have shown amediating effect on clinical improvements following treatment with several psychedelic substances; however, the relationship between mystical experiences and clinical outcomes following ibogaine remains unclear. We examined the association between mystical experiences during ibogaine and subsequent changes in PTSD severity. We also explored the relationship
